John Wick: Chapter 4 (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $187,131,806Details
International Box Office $260,184,599
Worldwide Box Office $447,316,405
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,406,416
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $22,172,031
Total $28,578,447
Further financial details...

Synopsis

John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances across the globe and forces that turn old friends into foes.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$73,817,950 (39.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.54 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:41.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,855 opening theaters/3,855 max. theaters, 6.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $204,579,197

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 24th, 2023 (Wide) by Lionsgate
March 24th, 2023 (IMAX) by Lionsgate

March 22nd, 2023 (Limited) (Finland)

Synopsis

John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances across the globe and forces that turn old friends into foes.
